info.title: AI Sonar AI Gateway
info.description: Organization balance, API key management, and key-level usage/billing via management token

tags.name: Management
tags.description: Organization API key management and key-level usage/billing via management token

post.description: Creates a model response for the given chat conversation. Supports streaming and function calling.

schema.description: Server-Sent Events stream with JSON chunks

post.description: Creates an embedding vector representing the input text.

value.input: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

post.description: Creates embeddings for multimodal input items. Text input is generally available; image input may require feature enablement.

input.text: Describe this product for semantic search.

post.description: Creates an image given a prompt.

get.description: Compatibility alias for polling public async image task IDs such as `ldtask_...`. Prefer the `poll_url` returned by create responses, or use `/v1/tasks/{id}` as the canonical fixed status endpoint. This route uses the same authorization, ownership checks, billing headers, terminal snapshots, and response shape as the image-specific status handler.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The public async image task ID returned by `id` / `task_id`, or embedded in `poll_url`.

403.description: Task not available to the current API key

404.description: Task not found or no longer available

post.description: Generates audio from the input text (Text-to-Speech).

value.input: This is high quality speech synthesis.

post.description: Transcribes audio into text (Speech-to-Text).

Creates an asynchronous video generation task. The response returns a canonical task ID and usually a preferred `poll_url`; clients should poll `poll_url` first, or use `/v1/tasks/{id}` as the fixed status endpoint.

value.prompt: A cinematic shot of a golden retriever running through a field of sunflowers
Make this image come alive with gentle movement
Keep the same subject identity and palette while adding subtle motion

get.description: Retrieves the status and result of a video generation task. New clients should prefer the `poll_url` returned by create responses, or use `/v1/tasks/{id}` as the canonical fixed status endpoint. The `/v1/videos/generations/{id}` path remains for backward compatibility.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The async task ID returned by `id` / `task_id`, or embedded in `poll_url`

get.description: Retrieves the status and result of an asynchronous generation task. Prefer the `poll_url` returned by the create response; `/v1/tasks/{id}` is the canonical fixed status endpoint for video, music, and 3D jobs.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The async task ID returned by `id` / `task_id`, or embedded in `poll_url`

200.description: Task status (task-type specific fields may be present)

403.description: Task not available to the current API key

delete.description: Cancels a queued asynchronous task when the provider and model support cancellation. Currently, this public contract supports queued Volcengine Seedance video tasks (`seedance-1.5-pro`, `seedance-2.0`, and `seedance-2.0-fast`). Tasks that are already processing, completed, failed, expired, or unsupported are not cancelled.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The async task ID returned by `id` / `task_id`, or embedded in `poll_url`

200.description: Task cancelled. The task remains queryable and is represented as `failed` with `cancelled: true` for compatibility with existing async task status values.

400.description: Task type, provider, or model does not support cancellation

403.description: Task not available to the current API key

409.description: Task is no longer cancellable, for example because it is already processing or terminal

get.description: Lists the currently available models. Default responses are trimmed for discovery. Non-chat models may include a lightweight `aisonar.public_contract_summary` with only `public_operations` and `request_endpoint`; `agent_preferences` appears only when `recommended_for` is present. Deprecated `aisonar` is still returned as a compatibility alias during the migration.
Retrieves a model instance, providing basic information about the model.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The model ID

post.description:
Creates a model response using Anthropic's native request format. Supports Claude models with vision and streaming.

**Authentication:** Use `x-api-key` header or `Authorization: Bearer` header.

schema.description: Anthropic-style SSE stream with message_start, content_block_delta, message_stop events

post.description: Counts input tokens for an Anthropic-compatible messages request without creating a model response. Authentication is required; the operation is not billed.
Creates a native Anthropic Message Batch. Requests use the same Anthropic message parameters as /v1/messages.

get.description: Lists native Anthropic Message Batches for the authenticated organization.

parameters.name: before_id
parameters.description: Return batches before this batch id

parameters.name: after_id
parameters.description: Return batches after this batch id

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of batches to return

get.description: Retrieves the status and metadata for a native Anthropic Message Batch.

parameters.name: message_batch_id
parameters.description: Anthropic message batch identifier

delete.description: Deletes a native Anthropic Message Batch when supported by the upstream provider.

parameters.name: message_batch_id
parameters.description: Anthropic message batch identifier

get.description: Downloads JSONL results for a completed native Anthropic Message Batch.

parameters.name: message_batch_id
parameters.description: Anthropic message batch identifier

200.description: Message batch results in JSONL format

post.description: Cancels a native Anthropic Message Batch when it is still cancellable upstream.

parameters.name: message_batch_id
parameters.description: Anthropic message batch identifier

post.description:
Generates content using Google Gemini API format. Supports text and vision models.

**Authentication:** Use `?key=` query parameter, `x-goog-api-key` header, or `Authorization: Bearer` header.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Model name (e.g., gemini-2.5-pro)

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: API key (alternative to header auth)

post.description:
Streams content generation using Google Gemini API format. Returns Server-Sent Events.

**Authentication:** Use `?key=` query parameter, `x-goog-api-key` header, or `Authorization: Bearer` header.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Model name (e.g., gemini-2.5-pro)

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: API key (alternative to header auth)

schema.description: SSE stream with Gemini response chunks

post.description: Creates a response using the OpenAI Responses API format. Supports stateful conversation management.

oneOf.description: Structured input items for the conversation.

input.description: Input content as a string or structured item array.

tools.description: Tools available to the model. For hosted image_generation tools that use the default image tool model or explicitly set model: gpt-image-2, AI Sonar removes unsupported input_fidelity before forwarding because GPT Image 2 already treats image inputs as high fidelity. Do not send background: transparent for that tool; AI Sonar does not silently remove it because that changes output semantics.

tool_choice.description: Tool choice policy or explicit tool selection.

stream_options.description: Streaming options such as usage chunk inclusion.

reasoning_effort.description: Reasoning effort hint for compatible models.

include.description: Additional response sections to include when supported.

service_tier.description: Service tier hint for compatible providers.

truncation_strategy.description: Truncation strategy for long conversations when supported.

parallel_tool_calls.description: Whether the model may issue parallel tool calls.

post.description: Compacts a Responses conversation for Codex CLI remote compaction. This endpoint uses `POST /v1/responses/compact`; do not use `/v1/compact`. The request `model` is the current Codex session model and must be available on the Responses path.

model.description: Model to use for compaction. Codex CLI sends the current session model.

stream.description: Streaming is not supported for compaction.

post.description: Reranks documents by relevance to a query using semantic similarity.
Creates a music generation task using Suno. Returns a task ID for polling.

mv.description: Music/video mode hint for compatible providers.

continue_clip_id.description: Clip ID to continue when extending an existing generation.

continue_at.description: Timestamp in seconds for continuation flows.

get.description: Retrieves the status and result of a music generation task.

post.description: Creates a 3D model generation task using Tripo3D. Returns a task ID for polling.

style.description: Style hint for compatible 3D model families.

get.description: Retrieves the status and result of a 3D generation task.
Returns the current organization balance totals for the authenticated management token.
Lists user-managed API keys for the current organization management token.

post.description: Creates a new user API key for the current organization management token.

name.description: Display name for the user API key. Trimmed server-side. Length must be 1-50 characters.

limitAmount.description: Spending limit input in USD. `null` or omitted means unlimited usage, and `0` means zero quota.

limitCurrency.description: Currency for `limitAmount`. USD is the only active currency. Sending `CNY` returns 400 `currency_retired`.

models.description: Optional logical model allowlist. Empty array means no per-key model restriction beyond organization policy.

expiresAt.description: Optional RFC3339 timestamp. null means no expiry.

patch.description: Updates a user-managed API key for the current organization management token.

status.description: Lifecycle status for the user API key.

name.description: Updated display name. Length must be 1-50 characters after trimming.

limitAmount.description: Updated spending limit input in USD. `null` means unlimited and `0` means zero quota.

limitCurrency.description: Currency for `limitAmount`. USD is the only active currency. Sending `CNY` returns 400 `currency_retired`.

expiresAt.description: Updated RFC3339 expiry timestamp. null clears the expiry.

schema.description: At least one field must be provided.

get.description: Returns paginated key-level usage details without exposing physical routing metadata.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: 1-based page number. Default is 1.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size. Default is 50 and the maximum is 100.

parameters.name: logicalModel
parameters.description: Filter by requested logical model name. Maximum length 100.

parameters.name: modelVendor
parameters.description: Filter by public model vendor. Maximum length 100.

parameters.name: scene
parameters.description: Filter by public request scene.

parameters.name: accessChannel
parameters.description: Filter by access channel: platform billing or your own upstream provider key (BYOK).

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Inclusive date filter. Accepts either RFC3339 with timezone (for example 2026-03-28T00:00:00+08:00) or YYYY-MM-DD.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Inclusive date filter. Accepts either RFC3339 with timezone (for example 2026-03-28T00:00:00+08:00) or YYYY-MM-DD.

get.description: Returns aggregated key-level billing breakdowns without exposing physical routing metadata.
Retrieves pricing-only detail for one model. Use this endpoint for price explanation, not for non-chat request construction.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The model ID

post.description: Uploads a JSONL batch input file or an image input file that can be referenced by file_id in supported image edit requests.

purpose.description: Use batch for Batch API JSONL files. Use user_data or vision for image files that will be referenced from image edits.

model.description: Optional AI Sonar extension for image file uploads. Defaults to gpt-image-2 and binds the returned file_id to the selected upstream image-edit channel.

parameters.name: purpose
parameters.description: Listing currently covers AI Sonar batch files. Image file uploads are bound for reuse by file_id but are not listed from local storage.

post.description: Creates an OpenAI-compatible batch job.

get.description: Returns the public pricing surface for active models, with optional provider and tag filters.

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: Filter by provider ID.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Filter by model tag.

post.description: Translates text into a target language using the current public translation contract.
Transcribes audio and translates the result to English.

get.description: Returns realtime endpoint metadata for normal HTTP GET requests. WebSocket clients use the same path with `?model={model}` and Bearer API key authentication to open realtime speech or multimodal sessions.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Realtime model ID to route the WebSocket session. Required for WebSocket upgrade requests; optional for plain HTTP metadata checks.

200.description: Realtime endpoint metadata returned for non-WebSocket GET requests

post.description: Edits an image using multipart image uploads, JSON image URLs, or the official JSON images array for supported GPT Image models.

image_url.description: Single source image URL. Kept for AI Sonar compatibility; use images for the official JSON shape.

image_urls.description: Multiple source image URLs. GPT Image edits accept up to 16 source images; xAI Grok Imagine edit models accept at most 3 source images.

images.description: Official JSON image references for image edits. Provide exactly one of image_url or file_id for each item. GPT Image edits accept up to 16 source images; xAI Grok Imagine edit models accept at most 3 source images.

file_id.description: A file id returned by AI Sonar /v1/files and bound to the same upstream image-edit channel.

image.description: Source image file(s). Repeat image for multiple source images. GPT Image edits accept up to 16 images; xAI Grok Imagine edit models accept at most 3 source images.

image[].description: Alternative repeated multipart field name for multiple source images. The same model-specific limits apply: GPT Image up to 16, xAI Grok Imagine up to 3.

post.description: Generates image variations from a multipart image upload.

get.description: Lists enabled models through the Gemini-compatible v1beta model discovery surface.
Retrieves model metadata through the Gemini-compatible v1beta surface.

BearerAuth.description: API Key authentication. Get your API key from the dashboard.

ManagementTokenAuth.description: Management token authentication. Get your management token from Dashboard Settings.

model.description: ID of the model to use (e.g., gpt-5.4, claude-sonnet-4-6)

messages.description: A list of messages comprising the conversation

stream.description: If true, returns a stream of events

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate

max_completion_tokens.description: Maximum completion tokens for newer reasoning-enabled model families

tools.description: List of tools the model may call

stream_options.description: Streaming options such as usage chunk inclusion.

parallel_tool_calls.description: Whether the model may issue parallel tool calls.

reasoning_effort.description: Reasoning effort hint for compatible model families.

logprobs.description: Whether to return log probabilities for output tokens.

top_logprobs.description: Number of most likely tokens to return at each position when logprobs is enabled.

top_k.description: Top-k sampling cutoff for compatible providers.

modalities.description: Requested output modalities such as text or audio.

audio.description: Audio output configuration when requesting audio modality.

prediction.description: Prediction hints for providers that support draft or speculative decoding.

service_tier.description: Service tier hint for compatible providers.

role.description: The role of the message author

name.description: Name of the function/tool (for function/tool messages)

tool_calls.description: Tool calls made by the assistant

tool_call_id.description: ID of the tool call being responded to

parameters.description: JSON Schema for function parameters

model.description: ID of the model to use

input.description: Input text(s) or token array(s) to embed.

size.description: Image size. For gpt-image-2, use auto or WIDTHxHEIGHT; custom dimensions must both be multiples of 16, longest edge <= 3840px, long/short ratio <= 3:1, and total pixels between 655,360 and 8,294,400.

quality.description: Image quality. DALL-E models use standard/hd; GPT Image models such as gpt-image-2 use auto/low/medium/high.

background.description: Background handling for compatible image generation flows such as gpt-image-2 text-to-image. Not supported for gpt-image-2 image edits.

output_format.description: Output image format for compatible image models such as gpt-image-2

output_compression.description: Output compression level from 0 to 100 for compressed formats

compression.description: Alias for output_compression when supported by the upstream-compatible route

moderation.description: Moderation strictness for compatible image models such as gpt-image-2

partial_images.description: Number of partial images requested for streaming-compatible upstreams; upstream usage must include the additional image output tokens

voice.description: Voice to use. Common voices include alloy, ash, ballad, coral, echo, fable, nova, onyx, sage, shimmer, and verse.

timestamp_granularities.description: Timestamp granularity selection. Requires verbose_json output when requesting word-level timestamps.

operation.description: Requested video operation. If omitted, AI Sonar infers the operation from the provided inputs. Explicit operation is recommended for production reliability.

image.description: Inline image as a data URL (for example, data:image/png;base64,...). Prefer image_url for broader production compatibility.

image_url.description: Publicly reachable image URL for image-to-video generation. Preferred over inline base64 in production.

video_url.description: Publicly reachable video URL for video-to-video style flows and motion-control models.

output_audio.description: Model-dependent audio output toggle. Veo 3 family defaults to true when omitted. Kling 3.0 Video accepts this selector for non-element-reference requests and maps it to the compatible upstream sound control; omitted Kling requests default to silent output. Do not combine output_audio=true with kling_elements. The camelCase alias outputAudio is accepted for compatibility.

negative_prompt.description: What to avoid in the video

start_image.description: First frame image input for start-end-to-video flows.

end_image.description: Last frame image input for start-end-to-video flows.

image_urls.description: Image URL array for compatible image-conditioned video flows. Route-level support currently allows up to 9 entries.

kling_elements.description: Kling 3.0 element references for kling-3.0-video image-conditioned requests. Define 1-3 elements and reference them in the prompt with @name. Each element requires 2-4 image URLs in element_input_urls. Do not combine kling_elements with output_audio=true; omit output_audio or set it to false for element-reference requests.

name.description: Element name used in the prompt without the @ prefix.

description.description: Optional short description of the element.

element_input_urls.description: Reference image URLs for this element. Kling 3.0 expects 2-4 images per element.

reference_images.description: Canonical public reference-image field for reference-to-video conditioning. Route-level support currently allows up to 9 URLs or compatible data URLs; model-specific public contracts can be lower. xAI grok-imagine-video accepts up to 7 image references with duration capped at 10 seconds, and grok-imagine-video-1.5-preview does not accept reference images.

reference_image_type.description: Optional reference image role for models that distinguish between asset and style references. The camelCase alias referenceImageType is accepted for compatibility.

audio_url.description: Publicly reachable audio URL for model-specific audio-conditioned video flows.

task_id.description: Provider-specific task ID used by some continuation, extension, or derivative flows.

extend_at.description: Model-specific extension start offset used by some video-extension flows.

extend_times.description: Model-specific extension multiplier or repeat count used by some video-extension flows.

seconds.description: Alias of duration used by some upstream-compatible request shapes.

size.description: Model-specific size tier used by some OpenAI-compatible video models.

watermark.description: Optional watermark toggle for models that expose it.

effect_type.description: Model-specific effect selector for specialized editing flows.

video_urls.description: Compatibility array for video-conditioned flows when multiple input videos are supported by the routed model family.

audio_urls.description: Compatibility array for audio-conditioned flows when multiple audio references are supported by the routed model family.

cancelled.description: True when a queued async task was cancelled before execution. Cancelled tasks are represented with `status: failed` for compatibility with existing async task status values.

cancellation_status.description: Cancellation marker for tasks cancelled through the public async task contract.

aisonar.description: Deprecated alias for aisonar. Retained for compatibility during the AI Sonar migration.

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate

tools.description: Tool definitions available to the model.

tool_choice.description: Tool choice policy or explicit tool selection.

metadata.description: Request metadata echoed into downstream logs or traces when supported.

thinking.description: Thinking configuration for compatible Anthropic-style models.

stream_options.description: Streaming options such as usage chunk inclusion.

service_tier.description: Service tier hint for compatible providers.

organization_id.description: Organization associated with the current management token.

total_recharge.description: Total successful organization recharge amount in USD.

total_used.description: Total organization usage spend in USD.

limit_amount.description: API key spending cap in USD. null means unlimited.

used_amount.description: Accumulated API key usage in USD.

billing_transaction_id.description: Settled billing transaction id for request-level reconciliation.

ModelListAisonarExtension.description: AI Sonar discovery fields for the list route. Detail-only metadata such as capability flags, pricing provenance, full public contracts, and empty recommendation snapshots are omitted.

aisonar.description: Deprecated alias for aisonar. Retained for compatibility during the AI Sonar migration.

ModelAisonarExtension.description: AI Sonar extension fields for the detail route, including pricing, capabilities, recommendation metadata, and the full non-chat public contract.

tools.description: Tool definitions available to the model.

tool_choice.description: Tool choice policy or explicit tool selection.

input_tokens.description: Number of input tokens in the supplied Anthropic messages request

custom_id.description: Client-supplied identifier for this batch item

AnthropicMessageBatch.description: Anthropic-compatible message batch object relayed from the upstream provider.

processing_status.description: Current upstream processing status for the batch

request_counts.description: Upstream request count summary for the batch

ended_at.description: ISO timestamp when processing ended, when available

created_at.description: ISO timestamp when the batch was created, when available

expires_at.description: ISO timestamp when the batch expires, when available

model.description: Model to use for multimodal embeddings

dimensions.description: Optional embedding dimensionality when supported by the selected model

MultimodalEmbeddingInputItem.description: A multimodal embedding input item. Text input is generally available; image input may require feature enablement.

ModelListAI SonarExtension.description: AI Sonar discovery fields for the list route. Detail-only metadata such as capability flags, pricing provenance, full public contracts, and empty recommendation snapshots are omitted.

ModelAI SonarExtension.description: AI Sonar extension fields for the detail route, including pricing, capabilities, recommendation metadata, and the full non-chat public contract.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

PaymentRequired.description: Payment Required - Insufficient balance or quota exceeded

error.message: Insufficient balance. Please top up your account.
Rate limit exceeded. Please slow down.
All available channels failed to process the request
